Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC140 "AIRWOLFII-0600-C140" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0600 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Airwolf II.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0600 which: 1. Turn off interrupts from the two CIA chips and acks any pending CIA interrupts 2. Copies 14 bytes from $C120 (where they were in the original dump) to $DD02. The is done so that the CIA#2 settings are set to the default, which prevents a copy protection routine at $CEAD from displaying an illegal copy message (this routine is called from multiple places in the game code).
